text:
There once was a man who had a pet parrot. The parrot was very bright and would talk your ear off whenever it got a chance. One afternoon, the man decided it was too annoying to let him out all the time.

"You want out?" he said. "Just try talking yourself into a trance."

The parrot tilted its head, squawked thoughtfully, and said, "Trance?"

The man sighed. "Okay, then."

He took his finger and drew an elongating circle around the living room. The parrot mimicked the gesture.

Hours later, the parrot fluttered its wings dramatically. The man cuffed it gently.

"Alright," he laughed, "time for a nap, you loud talker."

The parrot clucked in delight and slumped down onto the living room rug, still talking in its sleep.

"Won't happen again," the man muttered to himself before heading out.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
